data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for attribution model selection.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Attribution model selection (first touch/last touch/custom)', but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or data related to this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for this functionality but does not provide any evidence that it has been implemented or validated in the current saga run, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of attribution model selection validation.
